tests.scenario: Access a meditation session without payment
steps: Install and open the app as a new user
Browse the available meditation sessions
Select one available meditation session
Attempt to start the session without entering payment information
tests.expected_result: The selected meditation session starts without requiring payment.
tests.notes: Revised from the automated test to match the updated hybrid requirement for free access to core meditation content.

steps: Open the donation feature in the app
Enter valid payment details
Submit the donation
tests.expected_result: The donation is processed successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.
tests.notes: Rewritten to test the donation flow directly instead of using vague wording about affordability.

tests.scenario: Access the beginner meditation course from the main interface
steps: Open the app as a new user
View the main interface
Locate the beginner meditation course
tests.expected_result: A beginner meditation course is visible on the main interface and can be selected.
tests.notes: Revised to align with the hybrid requirement that specifies presence and accessibility of the beginner course.

tests.scenario: Start a meditation session within two interactions from the home screen
steps: Open the app and remain on the home screen
Count each user interaction
Attempt to start a meditation session
tests.expected_result: A meditation session begins within two user interactions from the home screen.
tests.notes: Rewritten to make the usability constraint measurable and directly testable.

tests.scenario: View the title and duration of each meditation session before selection
steps: Open the app
Navigate to the list of meditation sessions
Inspect the information shown for each session before selecting one
tests.expected_result: Each listed meditation session displays both a title and a duration before selection.
tests.notes: Updated to match the refined content display requirement and remove subjective quality claims.

tests.scenario: Continue audio playback when the device screen turns off
steps: Open the app
Start a meditation session with audio playback
Turn off the device screen while the session is playing
tests.expected_result: Audio playback continues without interruption after the device screen turns off.
tests.notes: Revised to test the specific reliability issue mentioned in the reviews.

tests.scenario: Display a confirmation prompt before signing out
steps: Open the app while logged in
Select the sign out option
tests.expected_result: A confirmation prompt is displayed before the user is signed out.
tests.notes: Rewritten to match the updated hybrid requirement for sign out confirmation.

tests.scenario: Manually mark a meditation session as completed
steps: Start a meditation session
Exit the session before it finishes
Select the option to mark the session as completed
tests.expected_result: The session is recorded as completed after the user selects the completion option.
tests.notes: Updated to reflect the concrete feature request from the hybrid requirement.

tests.scenario: Restore progress data after login on a new device
steps: Create or use an account with existing progress data
Log in to the same account on a new device
Open the progress section
tests.expected_result: Previously recorded progress data is restored and visible on the new device.
tests.notes: Rewritten to directly test cross device progress restoration supported by the review evidence.

tests.scenario: Play multiple meditation sessions sequentially without manual interaction
steps: Open the app
Select multiple meditation sessions for playback
Start playback
Observe the transition between sessions
tests.expected_result: The selected sessions play one after another without requiring further user interaction between sessions.
tests.notes: Updated to test the specific sequential playback feature instead of vague customization behavior.

tests.scenario: Track and display a consecutive day meditation streak
steps: Complete a meditation session on one day
Complete another meditation session on the following day
Open the progress or streak display
tests.expected_result: The system displays a streak count of 2 consecutive days.
tests.notes: Revised to make streak tracking measurable and directly tied to the hybrid requirement.
